title: The Good Daughter
description: Camille has spent thirty-four years being the reliable one — the daughter who answers the phone, manages the crisis, smooths the family over. When her glamorous, impossible mother is diagnosed with early dementia, Camille must move back into the house she escaped, and finally reckon with a question she's avoided her whole life: what is owed, and to whom, and when is a debt finally paid? A sharp, unsentimental drama about caregiving and the cost of being good.

chapters.title: The Phone Always Rings for Me
